summary: First testing run for Routier Facile MVP. Backend (13/13 pytest tests) is 100% passing — auth (register/login/me/wrong-pw), entry CRUD with auto-computed totals (driving/rest/working/amplitude), duplicate-date 400, week/month/dashboard summaries all work. Frontend mobile E2E ran on 420x900 viewport: login page renders, registration → dashboard works, ComplianceBar + dashboard tiles render, EntryForm submit navigates to /history. Logout clears session and hides bottom nav as required. Two issues found on frontend.

ui_bugs.issue: nav-monthly tab not reachable on 420px mobile viewport. Clicking [data-testid="nav-monthly"] did not navigate; URL remained on /history. Screenshot shows only 3 of 4 tabs visible (Tableau, Nouvelle, Historique). The 4th 'Mensuel' tab appears clipped/overlapped by the 'Made with Emergent' badge in the bottom-right corner.

integration_issues.issue: After filling EntryForm and clicking submit-entry, app navigates to /history, but History shows '0 journée enregistrée' and Dashboard still shows 'Conduite 0h00 / Jours travaillés 0' / 'Découcher 0'. Backend logs confirm POST /api/entries returned 200 OK (entry was persisted server-side). This is a frontend state/refetch issue — History.jsx and Dashboard.jsx are not re-fetching after a successful create, OR the History/Dashboard list call happens before the create completes / uses stale cached state.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' floating badge overlaps the rightmost bottom-nav item on 420px viewport, making nav-monthly visually obscured and the badge competes with the sticky bottom navigation z-index/positioning.
Bottom nav labels are partially clipped on the right edge.

action_items: Fix bottom-nav layout so all 4 tabs (Tableau / Nouvelle / Historique / Mensuel) are fully visible and clickable on 420px viewport. Either reduce padding-right reserved for the 'Made with Emergent' badge, give the nav a higher z-index, or place the 4 tabs in a flex container that fills width:100% with equal flex-basis so the 4th tab is not clipped.

Fix Dashboard.jsx + History.jsx to refetch entries after EntryForm submit (or invalidate cache / use a global store update). Currently the POST succeeds (verified 200 OK in backend logs) but UI shows zero entries until a hard reload.

Manually verify on https://logbook-driver.preview.emergentagent.com/history after refresh that the entry shows up — if so, it's purely a refetch issue; if not, debug EntryForm POST payload (driving_segments parser for '4h00').
Add data-testid history-item-<id> after fix so per-entry navigation can be tested.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 440-line file — acceptable for MVP but should be split into routers (auth, entries, summary) and a services layer if it grows.

CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True — browsers reject this combination. Currently OK in preview because frontend uses Bearer header, but cookie-based auth via cross-site requests will fail in production. Set CORS_ORIGINS to explicit origins.
create_index('email', unique=True) at startup is good; ensure seed_admin runs before first user registers.
enrich_entry mutates input dict and recomputes amplitude on every read — fine but field is also stored on insert; consider single source of truth.
Frontend should debounce the auto-redirect to /history until POST resolves and trigger a state refresh (mutation success → invalidate entries query).
test_credentials: admin@routier-facile.fr / Admin123! (seeded). New users registered with TEST_e2e_*@example.com / Passw0rd!
seed_data_creation: Created one test driver via /api/auth/register and one daily entry via /api/entries during pytest. Entry was deleted at end of test. One additional entry remains for the E2E-registered user from playwright run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is rock-solid. Focus next iteration on: (1) verifying entry list refreshes on Dashboard + History after create/edit/delete; (2) bottom-nav layout fix so nav-monthly is reachable on 420px width; (3) Monthly page (recharts + export-pdf button) end-to-end — could not be reached this iteration because nav-monthly was unreachable. Use Playwright on 420x900 viewport. Re-register a fresh TEST_e2e_* user each run to avoid duplicate-date 400 errors.
rca of the issue: Bottom-nav: 'Made with Emergent' badge (position:fixed bottom-right) overlaps the absolutely/fixed positioned bottom nav of the app. The 4th nav item ends up under the badge and pointer events go to the badge instead of the tab. Reproduction: open any authenticated page at 420x900, try to click the rightmost (Mensuel) tab — click is intercepted. Mitigation: either set nav z-index above badge AND add right padding so the icon does not visually sit under the badge, OR move the badge to top-right on mobile. Entry-create state: POST returns 200 with full entry payload, but Dashboard/History components do not refetch after navigation, so cached empty state persists. Mitigation: on EntryForm submit success, dispatch an event / call a context refresh / invalidate query before navigating, or call refetch() in History/Dashboard useEffect with location key dependency.
